text:
Here are the precise answers:

**(a)** There are **17 open pull requests** across all repositories.

**(b)** The repository with the most open PRs is **`acme/infra`** with **9** open pull requests.

Full breakdown by repository:

| Repository | Open PRs |
|---|---|
| `acme/infra` | 9 |
| `acme/web` | 4 |
| `acme/api` | 3 |
| `acme/mobile` | 1 |

data: [{"name":"github__list_pull_requests","description":"List pull requests, optionally filtered by repo, state (open/merged/closed), or author.","args":[":repo?",":state?",":author?"],"effect":"read"},{"name":"github__get_pull_request","description":"Get a single pull request by repo and number.","args…(+39)

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(let [by-repo (frequencies (map :repo open-prs))
      top (apply max-key val by-repo)]
  {:total-open (count open-prs)
   :by-repo (sort-by val > by-repo)
   :top-repo {:repo (key top) :count (val top)}})"}
